scripts.dev: concurrently "yarn workspace devtools-suite-renderer dev" "yarn workspace devtools-suite-electron dev"
scripts.build: yarn workspace devtools-suite-renderer build && yarn workspace devtools-suite-electron build
scripts.start:server: cd server && yarn build && yarn start
scripts.start:chat-server: cd chat-server && python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5298 --reload
scripts.stop:all: bash -lc 'for p in 5199 5198 5197 5298; do pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:$p); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then echo "$pids" | xargs kill -9; fi; done'
scripts.start:all:pro: yarn build:pro && pm2 stop xTool-mcp xTool-server && pm2 start ecosystem.config.js
